findings.note: Barlow + Barlow Semi Condensed are two distinct optical variants
01-04 used only in the genuine 4-step process sequence

issues.title: Contact form never submits
issues.fix: Integrate Formspree / Netlify Forms or replace with mailto: as interim

issues.title: Hero stat cards + trust section repeat same 3 claims verbatim
issues.fix: Remove stat cards or give them unique content

issues.title: All pricing tiers show 'auf Anfrage' with no floor
issues.fix: Add 'ab X €/Monat' or remove pricing section

issues.title: Overlay link hover: lime (#A3E635) on white at ~1.6:1
